query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, publishedToFeed,
       CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasOdds,
       CASE WHEN spreadAwayBetsPct IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasSplits
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' 
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-18'
  AND awayTeam NOT IN ('navy','kent','george_washington','dayton','sam_houston_st','murray_st','st_josephs','illinois_chicago')
  AND homeTeam NOT IN ('wake_forest','illinois_st','utah_valley','bradley','new_mexico','nevada','colorado_st','california')
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, publishedToFeed,
       CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasOdds,
       CASE WHEN spreadAwayBetsPct IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasSplits
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' 
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-18'
  AND awayTeam NOT IN ('navy','kent','george_washington','dayton','sam_houston_st','murray_st','st_josephs','illinois_chicago')
  AND homeTeam NOT IN ('wake_forest','illinois_st','utah_valley','bradley','new_mexico','nevada','colorado_st','california')
ORDER BY id;
